title: Capraea acuminata

This plant is a member of the Capraria genus, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The Capraria genus is part of the order Lamiales, a large order of flowering plants that includes over 20,000 species. Capraea acuminata is also known to be a species of flowering plant, specifically a shrub or herbaceous plant. Its classification is based on its characteristics, such as its leaves, flowers, and growth habits.
